features.name: Nob Hill Nature Park
features.description: A small forested nature park with walking trails, native plants, and bird watching opportunities. A hidden gem in the Nob Hill enclave.

features.name: Overton Park
features.description: Small neighborhood pocket park with benches and green space, part of the Northwest District's network of mini-parks.

features.name: Powell Butte Nature Park
features.description: Larger nature park with hiking trails, wildlife viewing, and city views. Located on Powell Butte in SE Portland.

pocket_parks_nearby.name: Northwest District Pocket Parks
pocket_parks_nearby.description: Several small pocket parks scattered along NW Lovejoy and NW Northrup streets, providing green space with benches and pedestrian paths.

nearby_large_parks.name: Forest Park
nearby_large_parks.description: One of the largest urban forests in the US at 5,200 acres. Offers extensive hiking and mountain biking trails.

nearby_large_parks.name: Laurelhurst Park
nearby_large_parks.description: A historic 26-acre park featuring a pond, horseshoe pits, basketball courts, and a playground.
nearby_large_parks.address: SE Cesar E Chavez Blvd, Portland, OR 97215

nearby_large_parks.name: Columbia Park
nearby_large_parks.description: A 152-acre park with walking paths, an off-leash dog area, and sports fields along the Columbia River.
